channel.title: Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content on Emerald City Gear

item.title: How to Watch Seattle Mariners Games in 2026 (ROOT Sports Is Gone — Here's What's Next)
item.description: How to watch Seattle Mariners games in 2026 — Mariners.TV, cable, MLB.TV, and national broadcasts. ROOT Sports is gone. Here's what actually works now.

item.title: The Best Seattle Mariners Gifts in 2026 (For Every Kind of Fan)
item.description: The best Seattle Mariners gifts in 2026 — jerseys, hats, retro gear, and unique ideas for every Mariners fan on your list. All available on Fanatics and MLB Shop.

item.title: Best Seats at T-Mobile Park: A Section-by-Section Guide
item.description: Best seats at T-Mobile Park for Seattle Mariners games — section-by-section breakdown for every type of fan and budget.

item.title: Mariners.TV Review 2026: Is It Worth It?
item.description: Mariners.TV review for 2026 — pricing, what you get, device support, and whether it's worth it for Seattle Mariners fans replacing ROOT Sports.

item.title: The Best Seattle Mariners Jerseys to Buy in 2026
item.description: The best Seattle Mariners jerseys to buy in 2026 — current players, retro legends, women's and kids options. Honest picks from a real fan.
